title: zanthoxylum pimpinelloides
intro: Zanthoxylum pimpinelloides, also known as the prickly ash, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum pimpinelloides include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Zanthoxylum pimpinelloides include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be made by steeping the leaves, twigs, or roots in hot water.
